title: Craftified
description: A cozy modpack for beginners and advanced players to play together
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d11e3f10be5e916cc2d14732961fcaa977fb4cd8.png)
Explore a beautiful World and look out for structures to find their story.
**Craftified** aims for a cozy gaming experience for both **beginners** and **advanced** players. With mods that delay the end and mods that provide content for tech-savvy players. All in a vanilla based style.

Explore the wonderful world of **Craftified** and enjoy a vibrant world with new **animals**, **structures**, and **plants**. Get to know a world that changes with the seasons and will influence your behaviour. But as idyllic as the world may seem, it also has a few tricks to challenge advanced players. **Bosses** to defeat and **dimensions** that are as beautiful and terrifying like never before. So go on your own journey and learn new **skills**, craft new **armor**, **tools**, and **weapons**, or find some of it in mysterious **dungeons**. # Features 🎨 **Resource Pack** - to make the world a little more beautiful we use [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape) as resource pack
🌷 **Decoration** - design your home with a large collection of decorative items
🔝 **Skills** - become stronger by skilling your character with [Simply Skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-skills)
⚔️ **Fight** - choose your fighting style with one of the numerous weapons
🍂 **Seasons** - over time, the world will change depending on the season. So take care of your resources
🎤 **Voice Chat** - with [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) you can comunicate with your friends and strangers direcly in game
🏠 **Interactive Towns** - build and manage your own town with [MCA Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn)
📁 **Storage System** - keep an overview of your storage with [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) A nice look provides the GUI packs from [Moongosu](https://modrinth.com/user/Moongosu) ## Optimized **Craftified** has many mods that increase your game performance. So that you get the best gaming experience. - Embeddium - Lithium - FerriteCore - ModernFix - ImmediatelyFast - spark - Starlight - Exordium _...and few more_
